canonical_name: Interferon Induced with Helicase C Domain 1
step_rationale: Pattern-recognition receptor; drives innate immune activation and inflammatory signaling in CAD.
mechanism: IFIH1 is a viral RNA sensor that triggers innate immunity and pro-inflammatory responses implicated in atherosclerotic inflammation.

references.title: Unraveling the immune activation mechanisms of DAMPs in coronary artery disease through transcriptomic and single-cell analyses.
